source.title: TFOS DEWS II Diagnostic Methodology report
source.population: People undergoing dry-eye symptom screening, diagnosis, subtype assessment, differential diagnosis, or monitoring.
source.setting: Ocular-surface symptom assessment and eye-care diagnostic evaluation.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected dry-eye symptom, diagnostic-test, ocular-surface, eyelid, and contact-lens context. It does not support primary-care autonomous diagnosis, treatment, medicine, referral urgency, fixed follow-up, or UAE service pathways.

exact_location.heading: Clinical protocol for the dry-eye diagnostic test battery

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports dry-eye symptom screening, visual symptoms, tear-film tests, fluorescein or lissamine staining, and cornea, conjunctiva, or eyelid-margin observation without inferring diagnosis from symptoms alone.

items.rationale: Exact phrase located in inspected full source.

items.final_wording: Supports dry-eye symptom screening, visual symptoms, tear-film tests, fluorescein or lissamine staining, and cornea, conjunctiva, or eyelid-margin observation without inferring diagnosis from symptoms alone.
